content.body:
leo recall <query>: searches memories by tag/content substring with
landmark boost (+0.3). Supports --tags, --scope, --limit flags.

leo tour: displays top N landmark memories at current scope, formatted
as a numbered orientation list with centrality score, type, and tags.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(cmd): add leo recall and leo tour commands
